contentBlocks.original:
त्वमेव माता च पिता त्वमेव
त्वमेव बन्धुश्च सखा त्वमेव
त्वमेव विद्या द्रविणं त्वमेव
त्वमेव सर्वं मम देव देव
contentBlocks.transliteration:
tvameva mātā ca pitā tvameva
tvameva bandhuśca sakhā tvameva
tvameva vidyā draviṇaṃ tvameva
tvameva sarvaṃ mama deva deva
contentBlocks.translation: You alone are my mother, and You alone are my father. You alone are my relative and my friend. You alone are knowledge and wealth. You alone are everything to me, O Lord of Lords.
contentBlocks.meanings: त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; माता (mātā) – mother; च (ca) – and; पिता (pitā) – father; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; बन्धुः (bandhuḥ) – relative; च (ca) – and; सखा (sakhā) – friend; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; विद्या (vidyā) – knowledge; द्रविणं (draviṇaṃ) – wealth; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; त्वमेव (tvameva) – You alone; सर्वं (sarvaṃ) – everything; मम (mama) – to me; देव (deva) – O Lord; देव (deva) – of Lords;
